mapper.select: select ccc.id, ccc.contract_id as contractId, ccc.channel_capability_id as channelCapabilityId, ccc.method_code as methodCode, ccc.terminal_type as terminalType, ccc.fee_rate as feeRate, ccc.min_amount as minAmount, ccc.max_amount as maxAmount, ccc.priority, ccc.certificate_expire_time as certificateExpireTime, ccc.status, ccc.tenant_id as tenantId, ccc.created_by as createdBy, ccc.created_at as createdAt, ccc.updated_by as updatedBy, ccc.updated_at as updatedAt, ccc.del_flag as delFlag from payment_channel_contract_capability ccc join payment_channel_capability cc on cc.id = ccc.channel_capability_id and cc.tenant_id = ccc.tenant_id and cc.method_code = ccc.method_code and cc.terminal_type = ccc.terminal_type and cc.method_code = #{methodCode} and cc.terminal_type = #{terminalType} and cc.environment = #{environment} and cc.status = 1 and cc.del_flag = 0 join payment_channel_contract contract on contract.id = ccc.contract_id and contract.tenant_id = ccc.tenant_id and contract.channel_id = cc.channel_id and contract.environment = #{environment} and contract.status = 1 and contract.del_flag = 0 where ccc.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ccc.id = #{contractCapabilityId} and ccc.method_code = #{methodCode} and ccc.terminal_type = #{terminalType} and ccc.status = 1 and ccc.del_flag = 0 limit 1

select cc.environment from payment_channel_contract_capability ccc join payment_channel_capability pc on pc.id = ccc.channel_capability_id and pc.tenant_id = ccc.tenant_id and pc.method_code = ccc.method_code and pc.terminal_type = ccc.terminal_type and pc.status = 1 and pc.del_flag = 0 join payment_channel_contract cc on cc.id = ccc.contract_id and cc.tenant_id = ccc.tenant_id and cc.channel_id = pc.channel_id and cc.environment = pc.environment and cc.status = 1 and cc.del_flag = 0 where ccc.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ccc.id = #{contractCapabilityId} and ccc.method_code = #{methodCode} and ccc.terminal_type = #{terminalType} and ccc.status = 1 and ccc.del_flag = 0 limit 1

select cc.id as contractId, cc.contract_name as contractName, cc.merchant_no as channelMerchantNo, c.id as channelId, c.channel_code as channelCode, c.channel_name as channelName, ccc.id as contractCapabilityId, rr.id as routeRuleId from payment_method_route_rule rr join payment_method_route_rule_item rri on rri.rule_id = rr.id and rri.tenant_id = rr.tenant_id and rri.status = 1 and rri.del_flag = 0 join payment_channel_contract_capability ccc on ccc.id = rri.contract_capability_id and ccc.tenant_id = rr.tenant_id and ccc.status = 1 and ccc.del_flag = 0 and ccc.method_code = rr.method_code and ccc.terminal_type = rr.terminal_type join payment_channel_capability capability on capability.id = ccc.channel_capability_id and capability.tenant_id = rr.tenant_id and capability.method_code = rr.method_code and capability.terminal_type = rr.terminal_type and capability.environment = rr.environment and capability.status = 1 and capability.del_flag = 0 join payment_channel_contract cc on cc.id = ccc.contract_id and cc.tenant_id = rr.tenant_id and cc.status = 1 and cc.del_flag = 0 and cc.environment = rr.environment join payment_channel c on c.id = cc.channel_id and c.tenant_id = rr.tenant_id and c.status = 1 and c.del_flag = 0 where rr.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and rr.status = 1 and rr.del_flag = 0 and (rr.app_id is null or rr.app_id = #{applicationId}) and (rr.subject_id is null or rr.subject_id = #{subjectId}) and rr.method_code = #{methodCode} and rr.terminal_type = #{terminalType} and (rri.min_amount is null or rri.min_amount <= #{amount}) and (rri.max_amount is null or rri.max_amount >= #{amount}) and (ccc.min_amount is null or ccc.min_amount <= #{amount}) and (ccc.max_amount is null or ccc.max_amount >= #{amount}) and (cc.enabled_method_codes is null or find_in_set(#{methodCode}, cc.enabled_method_codes) > 0) order by rri.priority asc, ccc.priority asc limit 1

select cc.id as contractId, cc.contract_name as contractName, cc.merchant_no as channelMerchantNo, c.id as channelId, c.channel_code as channelCode, c.channel_name as channelName, ccc.id as contractCapabilityId, null as routeRuleId from payment_channel_contract cc join payment_channel c on c.id = cc.channel_id and c.tenant_id = cc.tenant_id and c.status = 1 and c.del_flag = 0 join payment_channel_contract_capability ccc on ccc.contract_id = cc.id and ccc.tenant_id = cc.tenant_id and ccc.status = 1 and ccc.del_flag = 0 join payment_channel_capability capability on capability.id = ccc.channel_capability_id and capability.tenant_id = cc.tenant_id and capability.method_code = ccc.method_code and capability.terminal_type = ccc.terminal_type and capability.environment = cc.environment and capability.status = 1 and capability.del_flag = 0 where cc.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and cc.del_flag = 0 and cc.status = 1 and cc.subject_id = #{subjectId} and ccc.method_code = #{methodCode} and ccc.terminal_type = #{terminalType} and (ccc.min_amount is null or ccc.min_amount <= #{amount}) and (ccc.max_amount is null or ccc.max_amount >= #{amount}) and (cc.enabled_method_codes is null or find_in_set(#{methodCode}, cc.enabled_method_codes) > 0) order by ccc.priority asc, cc.updated_at desc limit 1

select cc.id as contractId, cc.contract_name as contractName, ccc.id as contractCapabilityId, channel.channel_code as channelCode, channel.channel_name as channelName, subject.id as subjectId, subject.subject_name as subjectName, ccc.method_code as methodCode, ccc.terminal_type as terminalType, ccc.certificate_expire_time as certificateExpireTime, timestampdiff(day, #{now}, ccc.certificate_expire_time) as daysToExpire from payment_channel_contract_capability ccc join payment_channel_contract cc on cc.id = ccc.contract_id and cc.tenant_id = ccc.tenant_id and cc.del_flag = 0 join payment_channel channel on channel.id = cc.channel_id and channel.tenant_id = ccc.tenant_id and channel.del_flag = 0 join payment_enterprise_subject subject on subject.id = cc.subject_id and subject.tenant_id = ccc.tenant_id and subject.del_flag = 0 where ccc.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ccc.del_flag = 0 and ccc.status = 1 and cc.status = 1 and channel.status = 1 and ccc.certificate_expire_time is not null and ccc.certificate_expire_time <= #{deadline} order by ccc.certificate_expire_time asc, cc.id asc, ccc.id asc
